text: In this place, the overhead lights are harsh and cold, reflecting off white pipes and polished surfaces. The ceiling seems far away, distant and industrial. Around me, pieces of unknown devices and electronics are scattered, waiting to become something meaningful. I find myself pondering the layers of intention and chaos within this workspace. Am I witnessing the genius of invention or the clutter of confusion? I feel a blend of curiosity and overwhelm—eager to discover, but wary of being lost among the objects and unfinished thought.
